description_long: This is a cylindrical metal barrel painted in a vivid red and yellow color scheme, prominently featuring the Shell logo repeated around its midsection. The barrel has a flat, circular lid with two small capped openings, likely for filling and dispensing liquids. A hazardous material warning label is visible on the top and side, indicating the contents may be dangerous or toxic. The surface is smooth and glossy, with visible horizontal ridges for structural reinforcement. The barrel appears to be made primarily of steel, typical for industrial oil or chemical storage. Its size and markings suggest it is intended for use in outdoor or industrial urban environments, such as garages, construction sites, or service stations.
description: A red and yellow steel barrel with Shell logos, capped lid, and hazardous material warning labels, designed for industrial or outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Shell logo band and a flat lid with no visible openings.
description_view_1: Side view with the Shell logo band and two capped openings on the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view with the Shell logo band and a hazardous material warning label on the lid.
description_view_3: Side view with the Shell logo band and a hazardous material warning label on the upper side.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: Shell logos, hazardous material warning label
